summary: Skia m119 → m120 milestone bump. Clean merge with 59 unchanged upstream patches carried forward. The only interop change migrates GPU context factory calls from deprecated GrDirectContext::MakeGL/MakeVulkan to the new GrDirectContexts namespace (moved to new headers in m120). Three non-customized DEPS updated (libjpeg-turbo, spirv-cross, vulkan-headers). Generated P/Invoke bindings match after independent regeneration. Companion SkiaSharp PR is version-bump only with no hand-written C# changes.
recommendations: Verify the GrDirectContexts::MakeGL/MakeVulkan migration compiles on all GPU-enabled platforms (Windows D3D/GL, Linux GL, macOS Metal path unaffected)
Confirm libjpeg-turbo, spirv-cross, and vulkan-headers version bumps have no known CVEs in the new revisions
Merge mono/skia#173 first, then update the submodule pointer in SkiaSharp#3576 before merging

generatedFiles.summary: All 4 generated binding files (SkiaApi, SkottieApi, SceneGraphApi, ResourcesApi) match after independent regeneration against the PR head. HarfBuzz excluded as expected (not part of Skia updates). The new sk_surface_draw_with_sampling function was picked up correctly.
recommendations: No action required — generated files are consistent

upstreamIntegrity.summary: 4 upstream fork patches changed between m119 and m120 (out of 63 total). All are Go tooling files (.disabled.go.mod/sum/bzl) and DEPS — no C++ source patches changed. The 59 unchanged patches (C API headers, build configs, platform-specific code) carried forward identically.
recommendations: Review the DEPS patchDiff to confirm fork's custom dependency pins (brotli, expat, libpng, zlib, freetype, harfbuzz, libwebp, vulkanmemoryallocator) are preserved
The Go tooling files are disabled (.disabled prefix) and don't affect the build — low-risk changes driven by upstream dependency version bumps

changed.summary: Fork's DEPS patch updated for m120. Key changes: sk_tool_revision bumped, upstream deps updated with fork's comment-out pattern preserved (angle2, dawn, jinja2, markupsafe, abseil-cpp, tint, highway, icu, spirv-tools, wuffs commented out). Fork's custom pins maintained for brotli, expat, libpng, zlib, freetype, harfbuzz, libwebp, vulkanmemoryallocator. Non-customized deps (libjpeg-turbo, spirv-cross, vulkan-headers) updated to m120 upstream versions.

interopIntegrity.summary: 1 interop file changed: src/c/gr_context.cpp. The change migrates 4 GPU context factory calls from the removed GrDirectContext::MakeGL/MakeVulkan static methods to GrDirectContexts::MakeGL/MakeVulkan (new namespace in m120), with corresponding new #include directives for GrGLDirectContext.h and GrVkDirectContext.h. 96 interop patches carried forward unchanged.
recommendations: Verify GrGLDirectContext.h and GrVkDirectContext.h are present in the m120 upstream headers
Confirm the function signatures of GrDirectContexts::MakeGL/MakeVulkan match the old GrDirectContext versions (same parameters, same return type)

changed.summary: GPU context factory migration: 4 calls updated from deprecated GrDirectContext::MakeGL/MakeVulkan to GrDirectContexts::MakeGL/MakeVulkan namespace. Added two new #include directives: GrGLDirectContext.h and GrVkDirectContext.h. Affects gr_direct_context_make_gl, gr_direct_context_make_gl_with_options, gr_direct_context_make_vulkan, and gr_direct_context_make_vulkan_with_options C API functions. No signature changes to the C API — callers unaffected.

depsAudit.summary: 3 non-customized dependencies bumped to m120 upstream versions: libjpeg-turbo, spirv-cross, vulkan-headers. All 13 fork-customized pins (brotli, expat, libpng, zlib, freetype, harfbuzz, libwebp, etc.) are unchanged, preserving the fork's security patches.
recommendations: Check libjpeg-turbo changelog between the old and new revisions for any security fixes or behavioral changes
Verify vulkan-headers bump is compatible with the fork's vulkanmemoryallocator pin
spirv-cross update is standard for milestone bumps — verify no breaking API changes

changed.name: libjpeg-turbo
changed.summary: libjpeg-turbo bumped from 927aabfcd268 to ed683925e489. This is a non-customized dependency following upstream m120 pin. Same Chromium mirror URL. Check changelog for security fixes between these revisions.

changed.name: spirv-cross
changed.summary: SPIRV-Cross bumped from 6e1fb9b09efa to 637cff3d0589. Standard upstream m120 update of the Khronos SPIR-V shader cross-compiler. Used for GPU shader compilation. Same Chromium mirror URL.

changed.name: vulkan-headers
changed.summary: Vulkan-Headers bumped from 7e691380166f to aff5071d4ee6. Standard upstream m120 update of Khronos Vulkan API headers. Verify compatibility with the fork's pinned vulkanmemoryallocator version. Same Chromium mirror URL.

companionPr.summary: Version-bump-only companion PR. Updates submodule pointer to mono/skia#173 head, regenerates SkiaApi.generated.cs (adds sk_surface_draw_with_sampling binding), bumps VERSIONS.txt from m119 to m120 (assembly 3.119→3.120, nuget 3.119.4→3.120.0), and updates cgmanifest.json with new commit hash and milestone. No hand-written C# wrapper changes.
recommendations: After mono/skia#173 is merged (squash), update the submodule pointer in this PR to the new squash SHA on skiasharp branch
Consider adding a C# wrapper method for the new sk_surface_draw_with_sampling binding in a follow-up PR

findings.summary: New P/Invoke binding sk_surface_draw_with_sampling added — exposes upstream SKSurface::draw overload with sampling options parameter. No hand-written C# wrapper yet; consumers cannot access this from managed code until a wrapper is added.
Version numbers correctly bumped: milestone 119→120, soname 119.0.0→120.0.0, assembly 3.119.0.0→3.120.0.0, nuget 3.119.4→3.120.0 across all 30 packages.
